genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 18 May 2021

species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 324 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 130; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 175; De Padua et al., PROSEA 12 (1999) 81. var. angustatus Besser, Flora 17(Beibl.) (1834) 30. Distribution: Continental Asia. LUZON: Benguet, Mountain Province. Notes: In swamps, c. 1300m, thoroughly naturalized; cultivated here and there at low elevation. Naturalized.
species.distribution: Continental Asia, N America. LUZON: Benguet, Mountain Province.
species.notes: Naturalized in ditches, pools, fishponds and marshes (De Padua et al. 1999).

species.citation: Sol. , Hort. Kew., 1st Ed. 1 (1789) 474 ; Merrill, PJS 10c (1915) 288; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 175.
species.distribution: Bangladesh, Cambodia, China, Japan, Korea, Laos, Mongolia, Myanmar, Philippines, Taiwan, Thailand, Tibet, Vietnam. LUZON: Laguna, Mountain Province, Nueva Vizcaya.
species.notes: Known from Laguna from San Antonio, BS 14949. On boulders of stream beds at low and medium elevation. 0-2600m.
